title: 1961 South Vietnamese presidential election
summary: Presidential elections were held in South Vietnam on 9 April 1961. The result was a victory for Ngô Đình Diệm, who received 89% of the vote.
text:
Presidential elections were held in South Vietnam on 9 April 1961. The result was a victory for Ngô Đình Diệm, who received 89% of the vote.
